# Repository navigation

## Live site

Open any `*.html` file at the repository root, or visit the GitHub Pages URL once Pages is enabled. Pages:

| Page | Source | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `index.html` | `data/index.js` | Landing + executive summary |
| `theory.html` | `data/theory.js` | Theory overview, axioms, stage hierarchy |
| `status.html` | `data/status.js` | TECT-Status-Tier (T0–T7) per-pillar scorecard |
| `papers.html` | `data/papers.js` | Manuscript / paper drafts |
| `toe.html` | `data/toe.js` | TOE candidate cross-framework comparison |
| `results.html` | `data/results.js` | Numerical results inventory + Honest-status table |
| `history.html` (+ pages 2–7) | `data/history.js` | CHANGELOG-driven activity log |
| `records.html` | `data/records.js` | Active OPEN questions + retracted negative results |
| `math-notes.html` | `data/math-notes.js` | All Math notes index |
| `code.html` | `data/code.js` | Live code inventory with Purpose column |
| `code-old.html` | `data/code-old.js` | Older code versions for reproducibility |

## Asset structure

- `assets/math/TECT-Math*.tex.txt` — every Math note in plain LaTeX-text form.
- `assets/code/{pde,tools,supplementary,scripts,tests}/` — code mirror.
- `assets/manifest.json` — full asset manifest (path, size, mtime).
- `assets/CHANGELOG.md`, `assets/CLAUDE.md`, `assets/NAVIGATION.md` — snapshots of the canonical repository's top-level documents.

## Curated docs (this folder)

- `KEY_RESULTS.md` — pillar scorecard snapshot.
- `NAVIGATION.md` — this file.
- `POLICIES_INDEX.md` — index of binding repository policies.
